port.title: Gateway's service port
port.description: Provide the port used for OpenWebNet communication with the {name} gateway {host}

password.title: Gateway's password
password.description: Provide the OpenWebNet password for the {name} gateway {host}

custom.title: Manual gateway entry
custom.description: Fill out the information for your gateway

error.password_retry: Gateway refusing password negotiation, wait 60s before retrying.

abort.all_configured: All MyHome gateways are already configured
abort.already_in_progress: The configuration of this gateway is already in progress

menu.title: Select Action
menu.description: Choose what you want to do with the MyHome integration.

scan_active.title: Active Bus Scan
scan_active.description: This will scan all standard addresses on the SCS bus for lights, covers, and heating zones. It takes about 10-15 seconds. Do you want to start?

sniff_passive.title: Passive Bus Sniffing
sniff_passive.description: This will listen to events on the bus. Walk around and press interrupters/buttons on the wall to discover them. Choose the listening duration below.

data.generate_events: Generate events in Home Assistant for each message received
data.enable_auto_learning: Enable background auto-learning (discover new devices as they are used)

error.invalid_config_path: Configuration file does not exist at this path

abort.scan_completed: Active scan completed! Found {count} new devices.
abort.scan_failed: Active scan failed. Check logs for details.
abort.sniff_completed: Passive sniffing completed! Found {count} new devices.
abort.sniff_failed: Passive sniffing failed. Check logs for details.

sync_time.name: Syncronize time
sync_time.description: Syncronize gateway's time to HA local time.

gateway.name: Gateway
gateway.description: The gateway's MAC address, as present in the config.

send_message.name: Send message
send_message.description: Send an arbitrary (but valid) OpenWebNet message to the gateway.

gateway.name: Gateway
gateway.description: The gateway's MAC address, as present in the config.

start_sending_instant_power.name: Start sending instant power
start_sending_instant_power.description: Get automatic instant power draw updates for a sensor.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Name(s) of entities that will start sending instant power information.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: For how long the instant power information will be sent.
